creator: sbruno@FreeBSD.org
text:
I've uploaded the contents of a failed mips build (via emulation in a chroot) here:

http://people.freebsd.org/~sbruno/cmake_mips.tar.gz

Platform/UnknownOS to use this system, please send your config file to cmake@www.cmake.org so it can be added to cmake
